name: FactorioExtended-Plus-Weaponry2
title: FactorioExtended Plus - Weaponry 2.0
author: roland77, rubesaca forked from jimmyjon711 (Original Author: Nath Gamer)
description: This mod ports the old FE+ mod to Factorio 2.0+. It contains higher tiers of defensive machines, like laser turrets or flame thrower. All come with higher damage dealt to the enemy but at a higher cost of electricity/burnable fluid. Also some better walls are included.
